message: pydantic-ai: to_ag_ui()/AGUIApp deprecated -> pydantic_ai.ui.ag_ui.AGUIAdapter
pydantic-ai: pydantic_ai.ag_ui deprecated -> pydantic_ai.ui.ag_ui
AG-UI: THINKING_* events deprecated -> REASONING_* (or skip)
stack: we chose AG-UI, not the Vercel adapter
psycopg: use psycopg3 (import psycopg), not psycopg2
SQL injection: f-string into .execute() -> %s params, data as 2nd arg
SQL injection: .format() into .execute() -> %s params
SQL injection: %-merging values into SQL -> pass params as 2nd arg
psycopg: quoted %s breaks adaptation -> unquoted %s
psycopg3: callproc() removed -> SELECT func(...) / CALL proc(...)
psycopg3: IN %s removed -> = ANY(%s) with a list
psycopg3: cursor subclasses gone -> psycopg.rows.dict_row
PG18: GENERATED column defaults to VIRTUAL (not indexable) -> add STORED if persisted
PG18: md5 auth deprecated -> SCRAM
OpenRouter: no usage.total_cost field -> use usage.cost (else silent zero-charge)
OpenRouter: stream_options.include_usage deprecated/no-effect -> remove
stack: use the OpenRouter base_url, not api.openai.com
assistant-ui: deprecated make*ToolUI/*Tool -> defineToolkit + render
assistant-ui: we chose AssistantSidebar (full pane), not AssistantModal
auth: use Better Auth (auth.api.getSession), not next-auth/getServerSession
Next16: unstable_cache removed -> 'use cache' / cacheLife / cacheTag
Next16: middleware() renamed -> proxy() in proxy.ts (Node-only)
Next16: serverRuntimeConfig removed -> process.env / NEXT_PUBLIC_*
Next16: skipMiddlewareUrlNormalize -> skipProxyUrlNormalize
Next16: next/legacy/image deprecated -> next/image
Next16: PPR/dynamicIO/useCache removed -> cacheComponents: true
Next16: AMP removed
Next16: revalidateTag needs a 2nd cacheLife arg
Next16/BetterAuth: auth/DB code needs the Node runtime, not edge
Next16: images.domains deprecated -> images.remotePatterns
